rationale: Educ. Code §21.004 governs teacher recruitment programs and references 'available funds' and 'discretionary funds' without tying amounts to property tax revenue or homestead exemption levels. No direct conflict with the proposed homestead exemption increase.
quote: To the extent that funds are available, the agency, the State Board for Educator Certification, and the Texas Higher Education Coordinating Board shall develop and implement programs to identify talented students and recruit those students
_note: No direct statutory linkage between Educ. Code §21.004 funding mechanisms and Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Indirect fiscal pressure on school district revenue is not a textual conflict with this statute.
